name: Better Butterscotch Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oven to 350°F (175°C). Spray a 9-inch square pan with nonstick cooking spray.
2. Lightly spoon flour into measuring cup; level off. In a large bowl, combine flour, brown sugar, baking powder, and salt; mix well. Add margarine or butter, water, vanilla, and eggs; blend until just combined. Spoon the batter evenly into the sprayed pan. Sprinkle with butterscotch chips.
3. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Allow cooling for 45 minutes or until completely cool before cutting into bars. Yields about 20 bars.
